behaviors.description: Storing a PASS review summary is blocked when any stored dimension finding for the same round has a FAIL verdict.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1: Unit seemed possible (single validator). Pass 2: real failure is at module handoff (summary writer + findings store query + round scoping), so Integration is the minimum. Rejected System: behavior text is about stored findings consistency, not OS/network/subprocess. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: no dependence on fresh model judgment; it evaluates persisted verdict data.
behaviors.test_description: Create a round with per-dimension stored findings including at least one FAIL, attempt to persist a PASS summary through the real service/repository wiring, and assert write is rejected with a domain error and no PASS summary persisted.

behaviors.description: Stop-gate verdict computation reads per-dimension stored findings directly and does not rely only on hand-written summary text.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1: Unit candidate for pure gate function. Pass 2: bug came from trusting summary text over stored findings, which is a cross-module data-source selection failure (gate + storage adapter + summary record). Rejected System: no real infra required. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: correctness here is source-of-truth selection on persisted data, not model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Persist conflicting data (summary text says all PASS, stored dimension findings include FAIL) and run stop-gate computation via real gate service. Assert verdict is FAIL/block based on stored findings and remains unchanged if summary text is edited.

behaviors.description: Manual summary text overrides require an explicit override flag and produce an auditable warning record.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1: Unit for flag check. Pass 2: requirement includes audit persistence side effect, so minimum boundary is service + policy + audit log repository. Rejected System: auditable record can be verified with local in-process persistence. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: no model decision dependence in behavior text.
behaviors.test_description: Submit manual summary override without flag and assert rejection; submit with explicit override flag and assert acceptance plus persisted warning/audit record containing actor, round id, and override reason.

behaviors.description: After Phase 4 fixes, the gate requires a review round identifier produced after the latest fix commit before PASS can be finalized.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1: Unit timestamp/ordering check. Pass 2: real failure requires correlating commit metadata with review-round metadata across modules. Rejected System: no requirement for real git subprocess or network in this behavior text if commit/round metadata are persisted and compared in-process. Rejected Workflow: only freshness validation is tested, not multi-agent decision quality.
behaviors.test_description: Record latest fix commit hash/time, then attempt PASS finalization with (a) missing round id, (b) stale pre-fix round id, (c) post-fix round id. Assert only (c) can pass gate.

behaviors.description: In the live review loop, PASS cannot finalize unless a fresh review-agent round runs on the updated diff.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1: Integration by asserting orchestrator calls runner. Pass 2: behavior explicitly requires a live review-agent round on updated diff; execution path passes through real LLM agent call, and mocking can hide failures where run metadata is produced without an actual agent execution. Rejected Workflow: this behavior requires one fresh agentic step, not multiple sequenced model decisions.
behaviors.test_description: Run the live loop after introducing a fix commit, attempt to finalize PASS before rerun (must fail), then execute a real review-agent round on the updated diff and verify PASS finalization is allowed only after that fresh round is recorded.

behaviors.description: If review rounds are exhausted with unresolved MUST-FIX findings in stored results, the outcome is escalation rather than PASS.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1: Unit rule check on counters/findings. Pass 2: minimum real boundary is orchestration state + stored findings + decision emitter; still deterministic over persisted data. Rejected Agentic: behavior text says unresolved MUST-FIX findings in stored results, so no fresh model output is needed to detect failure. Rejected Workflow: no requirement to execute multiple live agent rounds in this specific behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Seed stored results with unresolved MUST-FIX findings and max-rounds-reached state, run gate decision flow, and assert final outcome is escalation with PASS explicitly blocked.

behaviors.description: In a live multi-round review workflow, exhausted rounds with unresolved MUST-FIX findings still block PASS and emit escalation.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1: Agentic seemed enough. Pass 2: behavior explicitly requires a live multi-round workflow; correctness depends on sequenced agent rounds plus cross-round state handoff to final gate, so minimum is Workflow. Rejected Integration per INTEGRATION-BRAKE(d): this is orchestration across LLM-involved stages, not a single module handoff. Rejected pure Agentic: one-step agent test does not cover multi-round exhaustion logic.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the full live pipeline across multiple real review-agent rounds until round budget is exhausted while MUST-FIX findings remain unresolved; assert PASS is blocked and escalation event/record is emitted at workflow end.
